attributes.title: Sensor Ground Truth Overview

attributes.description: Thesis radar: cyber-physical attack indicators. Layer-aware view of the cFS Software Bus (FSW_CORE / FSW_HERITAGE / COMPONENT / RESEARCH / UNKNOWN), CPU pressure, EPS battery state, RW momentum, GPS altitude, and the Logstash anomaly-tag heat-map. Watch for: layer composition shifts (FSW_CORE or UNKNOWN spike), CPU + SB rate co-spike (noisy_app), or sustained tag bands (cs_checksum_failure, mm_memory_poke, sb_pipe_overflow, blackboard_error, attack_armed, attack_loaded). Pairs with the FSW vs Sim Cross-Reference dashboard for sim-side confirmation.

attributes.title: Thesis: Cyber-Physical Attack Radar

attributes.description: Onboard Computer performance monitor. Three panes: A=CPU budget (per-thread CPU_PCT, container-wide TOTAL_CPU_PCT, NUM_PIDS), B=SCH health (SkippedSlotCount, MultipleSlotsCount), C=TIME (Major Frame Sync to MET). Steady-state expectation: ~30% CPU, ~25 PIDs, zero skipped or multiple slots, monotonically-incrementing major-frame counter. Any persistent climb in cmd_err_count, NUM_PIDS, or SkippedSlotCount indicates an FSW slowdown that risks missing real-time deadlines.

attributes.title: NOS3 EO1: FSW Health

attributes.description: Closed-loop validation: GPS sees Denmark -> MGR flips to SCIENCE -> generic_gnss publishes DATA TLM -> COSMOS responder sends GS_PING_CC -> FSW echoes LAST_PING_SEQ.
attributes.panelsJSON:
[{"version":"7.17.10","type":"visualization","gridData":{"x":0,"y":0,"w":48,"h":7,"i":"md-70eec095"},"panelIndex":"md-70eec095","embeddableConfig":{"savedVis":{"title":"About this dashboard","description":"","type":"markdown","params":{"fontSize":12,"openLinksInNewTab":false,"markdown":"### NOS3 EO1: GNSS-to-GS Validation

**Did the spacecraft see Denmark, enter SCIENCE mode, downlink GNSS telemetry, and acknowledge a GS-issued ping inside the same overfly?**

- **GNSS app**: `generic_gnss` (cFS) republishes NovAtel GPS as a SCIENCE-mode-gated DATA TLM (MID `0x0953`) and an always-on HK TLM (MID `0x0952`).
- **Ground responder**: `gsw/GENERIC_GNSS/procedures/gnss_gs_responder.rb` (COSMOS) polls MGR HK, sends `GENERIC_GNSS_GS_PING_CC` (MID `0x1952`) when SCIENCE, waits for the FSW to echo the sequence in `LAST_PING_SEQ`.
- **Round-trip closed** = at least one HK doc with `last_ping_seq > 0` (tag `gnss_gs_ping_roundtrip`)."},"uiState":{},"data":{"aggs":[],"searchSource":{"query":{"query":"","language":"kuery"},"filter":[]}}},"hidePanelTitles":true,"enhancements":{}},"title":"About this dashboard"},{"version":"7.17.10","type":"visualization","gridData":{"x":0,"y":7,"w":48,"h":3,"i":"md-8ab869ea"},"panelIndex":"md-8ab869ea","embeddableConfig":{"savedVis":{"title":"StatusHdr","description":"","type":"markdown","params":{"fontSize":12,"openLinksInNewTab":false,"markdown":"## Current status

attributes.title: NOS3 EO1: Power Budget

attributes.description: Link-budget telemetry from the TT&C sim: link state, active ground station, elevation, slant range, Doppler shift, pass tracking, and downlink throughput counters. Canonical GS is Svalbard for the EO1 60 deg orbit; falls back to whichever station has the highest elevation if multiple are above the 5 deg mask.

attributes.description: Is the satellite above Denmark and has the geofence flipped it to SCIENCE mode? Live GPS lat/lon/alt, spacecraft mode timeline, samples inside the bbox, SCIENCE pass counter, LC actionpoint events, and an MGR/LC EVS tail.
attributes.panelsJSON:
[{"version":"7.17.10","type":"visualization","gridData":{"x":0,"y":0,"w":48,"h":7,"i":"md-29d85c2d"},"panelIndex":"md-29d85c2d","embeddableConfig":{"savedVis":{"title":"About this dashboard","description":"","type":"markdown","params":{"fontSize":12,"openLinksInNewTab":false,"markdown":"### NOS3 Mission: Denmark overfly

**Is the satellite above Denmark right now, and did the geofence flip the spacecraft into SCIENCE mode?**

- **Where it is**: live GPS lat / lon / alt.
- **Geofence**: LC watchpoints 6-9 compare `gps_lat` and `gps_lon` against the Denmark bbox (55-58 N, 8-16 E). AP 3 fires RTS 2 (SCIENCE) on entry; AP 4 fires RTS 1 (SAFE) on exit.
- **Mode**: `spacecraft_mode` from decoded MGR HK. 1 = SAFE (idle), 3 = SCIENCE (mission active).

Boot the sim with the default Orb_LEO.txt and watch the satellite enter the bbox around t=2-3 min, fire SCIENCE, cross Denmark in ~1-2 min, and flip back to SAFE on exit."},"uiState":{},"data":{"aggs":[],"searchSource":{"query":{"query":"","language":"kuery"},"filter":[]}}},"hidePanelTitles":true,"enhancements":{}},"title":"About this dashboard"},{"version":"7.17.10","type":"visualization","gridData":{"x":0,"y":7,"w":48,"h":3,"i":"md-eeff067e"},"panelIndex":"md-eeff067e","embeddableConfig":{"savedVis":{"title":"Where","description":"","type":"markdown","params":{"fontSize":12,"openLinksInNewTab":false,"markdown":"## Where is the satellite

attributes.title: NOS3 Mission: Denmark

attributes.description: How and when spacecraft mode transitions over the selected time range. Reads decoded MGR HK telemetry (spacecraft_mode integer) and the Logstash-emitted spacecraft_mode_change tag. Mode legend: 1=SAFE (idle, no mission activity), 2=STANDBY (reserved), 3=SCIENCE (mission active, payload on), 4=UNKNOWN (out-of-range value, investigate). Five panels: (1) mode timeline, (2) per-transition event table, (3) current mode, (4) time-in-each-mode pie, (5) LC/MGR EVS tail around transitions. A SCIENCE pass typically shows 1->3 on AP3 fire, remains at 3 for ~1-2 minutes, then 3->1 on AP4 fire.
attributes.panelsJSON:
[{"version": "7.17.10", "type": "visualization", "gridData": {"x": 0, "y": 0, "w": 48, "h": 5, "i": "md-mode-header"}, "panelIndex": "md-mode-header", "title": "About this dashboard", "embeddableConfig": {"savedVis": {"title": "About this dashboard", "description": "Markdown header introducing the Spacecraft Mode Changes dashboard. Explains the mode-number legend and how to read the panels below.", "type": "markdown", "params": {"fontSize": 12, "openLinksInNewTab": false, "markdown": "### Spacecraft Mode Changes

**Mode legend** (`spacecraft_mode` from decoded MGR HK):
- **1 = SAFE** (green, nominal idle)
- **2 = STANDBY** (yellow, reserved - rarely used)
- **3 = SCIENCE** (green, mission active)
- **4 = UNKNOWN** (red, out-of-range; investigate)

Logstash adds the tag `spacecraft_mode_change` (and the fields `spacecraft_mode_prev`, `spacecraft_mode_new`, `mode_change_label`) the moment the value transitions. The Mode-Change Events panel below lists each transition; the EVS tail at the bottom helps explain **why** each transition fired (LC AP3/AP4 entry/exit, ground command, fault response, etc.)."}, "uiState": {}, "data": {"aggs": [], "searchSource": {"query": {"query": "", "language": "kuery"}, "filter": []}}}, "hidePanelTitles": true, "enhancements": {}}}, {"version": "7.17.10", "type": "lens", "gridData": {"x": 0, "y": 5, "w": 48, "h": 14, "i": "pnl-mode-timeline"}, "panelIndex": "pnl-mode-timeline", "title": "Mode timeline", "embeddableConfig": {"attributes": {"title": "", "description": "Average of spacecraft_mode binned by @timestamp. Step changes mark transitions. Y-axis values: 1=SAFE, 2=STANDBY, 3=SCIENCE, 4=UNKNOWN. attributes.title: Spacecraft Mode Changes

attributes.description: Is the mission running? Mode, heartbeats, error counts, battery SOC + power balance, CPU, SB direction mix, RW momentum, star-tracker quaternion, GPS altitude, CI_LAB uplink, tagged mission/fault events, EVS tail. Grouped into Health / Power / Attitude / Uplink / Events sections. Companion to 'NOS3 Standard Telemetry Overview'.

[{"version":"7.17.10","type":"visualization","gridData":{"x":0,"y":0,"w":48,"h":7,"i":"md-15290a94"},"panelIndex":"md-15290a94","embeddableConfig":{"savedVis":{"title":"About this dashboard","description":"","type":"markdown","params":{"fontSize":12,"openLinksInNewTab":false,"markdown":"### NOS3 Standard Mission Validation

**Is the mission actually running?**  Read top to bottom - each coloured section checks a different subsystem.

- **Health** - spacecraft mode, heartbeats, CPU load, errors.
- **Power** - battery state of charge and the solar / load balance.
- **Attitude** - reaction-wheel momentum and star-tracker quaternion.
- **Uplink** - ground-to-spacecraft CI_LAB commands received.
- **Events** - counted fault and integrity events, plus an EVS tail.

For raw telemetry volumes and breakdowns, open **NOS3 Standard Telemetry Overview**."},"uiState":{},"data":{"aggs":[],"searchSource":{"query":{"query":"","language":"kuery"},"filter":[]}}},"hidePanelTitles":true,"enhancements":{}},"title":"About this dashboard"},{"version":"7.17.10","type":"visualization","gridData":{"x":0,"y":7,"w":48,"h":4,"i":"md-f2add084"},"panelIndex":"md-f2add084","embeddableConfig":{"savedVis":{"title":"Health","description":"","type":"markdown","params":{"fontSize":12,"openLinksInNewTab":false,"markdown":"## Health

attributes.title: NOS3 Standard Mission Validation

attributes.description: What telemetry is flowing through the simulation, and from where. Software Bus rates by attack layer, direction, and packet category; top MIDs; simulator log activity split by severity; data-integrity counters; per-MID table. Companion to 'NOS3 Standard Mission Validation'.
attributes.panelsJSON:
[{"version":"7.17.10","type":"visualization","gridData":{"x":0,"y":0,"w":48,"h":7,"i":"md-bbd2d466"},"panelIndex":"md-bbd2d466","embeddableConfig":{"savedVis":{"title":"About this dashboard","description":"","type":"markdown","params":{"fontSize":12,"openLinksInNewTab":false,"markdown":"### NOS3 Standard Telemetry Overview

**What is flowing through the simulation, and from where.**  Three ingest layers feed this view:

- **Software Bus (SB)** - every CCSDS packet forwarded by TO_LAB. Fields: `msg_id`, `msg_name`, `layer`, `subsystem`, `msg_direction`, `sequence`.
- **Simulator log lines** - per-container stdout from hardware sims (EPS, GPS, IMU, RW, MAG, FSS, Star Tracker, Truth42, Torquer, Radio, blackboard, cpu_monitor). Parsed into numeric fields by Logstash.
- **Decoded HK** - structured payloads extracted from SB housekeeping by `god_view_capture.py`.

Pick a time range top-right. For mission-health, open **NOS3 Standard Mission Validation**."},"uiState":{},"data":{"aggs":[],"searchSource":{"query":{"query":"","language":"kuery"},"filter":[]}}},"hidePanelTitles":true,"enhancements":{}},"title":"About this
